description: Search, browse, and read Food52 — recipes, articles, and structured ingredients/steps from the Food52 community-curated cookbook, with offline FTS and a local cache.

tools.name: articles_browse
tools.description: Browse the latest Food52 articles in a vertical (food, life)

tools.name: articles_get
tools.description: Get a Food52 article (story) by slug

params.name: slug
params.description: Article slug from the URL (e.g. best-mothers-day-gift-ideas)

tools.name: recipes_browse
tools.description: Browse Food52 recipes filtered by a tag (e.g. chicken, breakfast, vegetarian)

params.name: tag
params.description: Tag slug (chicken, breakfast, dinner, vegetarian, dessert, pasta, etc.)

tools.name: recipes_get
tools.description: Get full structured details for a single Food52 recipe by slug
